# Monsieur Click — Full AI Knowledge Base
> Local SEO agency near Paris. Click First™ method for small businesses — web design, GBP, GEO and AI visibility.
> Domain EN: https://monsieurclick.com
> Domain FR: https://monsieurclick.fr
> RSL 1.0

## Pages

### Home
URL: https://monsieurclick.com/
Title: Local SEO Agency Near Paris — Web Design & AI Visibility | Monsieur Click
Description: Local SEO agency for small businesses: local search rankings, Google Business Profile and web design that builds lasting visibility on Google, Maps and AI. Free audit.
Type: WebPage
Schema: WebSite, FAQPage

### Click First Method
URL: https://monsieurclick.com/click-first
Title: Click First™ — All-in-one SEO + AI Visibility System
Description: The Click First™ method: Local SEO, GEO, Website, Google Business Profile, Reviews, Schema, OKF, continuous optimization.
Type: WebPage
Schema: Service
